string.text:
Shown below the weapon description when the damage table toggle is on.

%c[d_blue]Type%c[default] — ammo label (calibre stripped from inv_name_short).
%c[d_blue]AP%c[default] — k_ap x 1000, same scale as the ammo card.
%c[d_blue]vs Torso / vs Head%c[default] — estimated damage at 20 m vs each armor tier.

Cell color runs grey to green by how well that round penetrates that tier. Degraded ammo is omitted.

%c[d_blue]Player BRC%c[default] shows friendly tier numbers (10-60).
%c[d_blue]NPC armor%%%c[default] shows the hidden bone-armor values used in the damage math.

Labels only — each column still uses its matched NPC armor profile.

Adds two custom stat rows plus real values appended to the existing GAMMA stat percentages ( · separator). Assumes 100%% weapon condition, default ammo, no attachments unless noted. Degraded ammo is skipped for the damage rows.

%c[d_blue]Hit Power%c[default]
New stat row. Weapon hit_power as %% per pellet (x100). No ammo k_hit; pellet count is not multiplied here.

%c[d_blue]Damage Per Ammo%c[default]
New stat row. Raw hit_power x k_hit x pellets per compatible ammo type, same order as the damage table (e.g. 45/38/22).

%c[d_blue]Accuracy%c[default]
Appended to the existing value. ADS standing-still cone half-angle from fire_dispersion_base (e.g. 0.35°). Fixed per shot; does not widen during full auto.

%c[d_blue]Handling%c[default]
Appended to the existing value. Hip-fire spread while moving: walk and run standing (e.g. walk 2.1° · run 5.2° hip). ADS standing still is covered by Accuracy.

%c[d_blue]Reliability%c[default]
Appended to the existing value. Shots to lose 10%% condition (best ammo to worst ammo with silencer wear x1.25), e.g. 27-108. Condition loss per shot, not jam odds.

%c[d_blue]Recoil Control%c[default]
Appended to the existing value. ADS camera kick per shot: first-shot angle, then the shot number where kick reaches 1° or more (e.g. 0.5° @1 → 1.0° @12).

%c[d_blue]Muzzle Velocity%c[default]
Appended to the existing value. Bullet drop at 100 m from physics speed (bullet_speed x k_bullet_speed), e.g. -0.1m @100m.

Every table damage value uses hidden NPC bone-armor (spine for torso, head bone for headshots), not the BRC labels on player armor. BRC numbers are a readable shorthand for those tiers.

%c[d_blue]vs Torso BRC columns roughly match in GAMMA:%c[default]
10 — Novice (leather jacket, stalker_novice)
20 — Trainee (light loner jacket, stalker_trainee)
30 — Professional (LCS / PS5-M, stalker_professional)
40 — Veteran (PS5 suit / soldier vest, stalker_veteran)
50 — Master (SKAT-9 / Berill, stalker_master)
60 — Legend (exoskeleton, stalker_legend)

%c[d_blue]vs Head BRC columns roughly match:%c[default]
10 — Respirator / gas mask (actor_helm_respirator)
20 — Screen helmet (actor_helm_screen)
30 — Hard hat / ZSH (actor_helm_hardhat)
35 — Battle helmet (actor_helm_battle)
45 — Exo / Spartan helm (actor_helm_spartan)

%c[d_blue]Table cell formula (20 m, current difficulty):%c[default]
1. dist = 1 + 20/200 x (k_air x 0.5 / (1 - k_air + 0.1))
2. AP = k_ap x 10 (+ 0.04 head) x tier_ap_scale / dist x difficulty x 0.80
3. power = hit_power / dist x k_hit x bone_mult x tier_ap_scale x 1.1 x difficulty x pellets (bone_mult 0.9 torso, 3.65 head; pellets = buck_shot or 1)
4. If AP >= tier armor: damage = power x 100, else damage = power x tier_chip x 100

Difficulty: Scout/Stalker 1.30, Veteran 1.05, Master 0.90.

%c[d_orange]NOT INCLUDED:%c[default] artefacts, plates, silencers, barrel wear, range other than 20 m, flat BR protection.
Adds Hit Power and raw Damage Per Ammo stat rows, plus real values on Accuracy, Handling, Reliability, Recoil, and Muzzle Velocity.
